summary: Yearly Calendar now shows clean date grids, updates are user-controlled, and the Profile badge alerts you to new releases.

notes: Yearly Calendar: fixed date cell sizing — cells are now computed from your exact screen width so dates never stack, overlap, or cluster
Yearly Calendar: activity days highlighted with a soft accent background; today highlighted with a filled accent circle
Yearly Calendar: scroll stops cleanly at the last month row — no empty space below
Software Update: updates are now user-controlled — the app will never silently refresh while you are adding schedules or editing tasks
Software Update: a new Service Worker waits for your permission before activating (no more surprise reloads)
Profile tab: a pulsing badge dot now appears on the Profile icon when a new update is ready, so you always know before going into settings
Update flow: tapping Update Now sends an explicit activation signal to the waiting update, then reloads cleanly
In Progress sheet redesigned — theme-aware gradient ring that matches your selected color theme
In Progress: stat pills now show elapsed time, total duration, and remaining time side by side
In Progress: action buttons cleaner — Mark as Completed (primary), Reschedule and Keep Going (secondary row)
Profile > System Settings: Privacy and Terms added as a proper slide-in page instead of a footer link
Software Update: now detects every Vercel deployment using build SHA, not just version number bumps
Software Update: version.json served with no-cache headers so Vercel CDN never returns a stale version
Software Update: ninja update detection — if the app updated while closed, a banner shows what changed on next open
Fixed Add Schedule saving the wrong date — the date you pick is now exactly the date that saves (timezone offset was being applied in the wrong direction)
Recurring schedules now appear correctly every week and in all future months across Daily, Weekly, Monthly, and Yearly views
Per-occurrence completion — completing one day of a repeating task no longer marks the entire series as done
Focus Hub: overdue items now flagged separately with Reschedule, Mark Completed, Mark Missed, and Clear options
Smart Reschedule now shows the full date and time for cross-day moves
AI Priorities: added a This Month summary covering busy days, free days, and overload risks
Theme polish: charts, score rings, and progress bars now follow the selected color theme throughout the app
Unified System Settings under Profile — Account, Notifications, Customize Dashboard, and Software Update all in one slide-in settings center
iPhone-style navigation: tap any setting to slide into its own page, back button returns to the list
AI assistant tone rewritten — supportive planning partner, no longer judgmental about missed tasks
Calendar Yearly view: month cards with day-of-week headers and highlighted today date
Streak algorithm fixed — streaks no longer reset to zero at the start of a new day
Dashboard metrics clarified — Today count and Load score now clearly labeled so the numbers make sense
All colors now use CSS variables — every screen adapts correctly when you switch themes
Added Missed and Skip options to the task completion prompt
Time-safe rescheduling — past time slots are disabled when moving a task
Removed all hardcoded demo data — every stat and score now reflects your real activity
Swipe-to-delete simplified: single tap, immediate action with an undo option
